# iWantU

> AI capability marketplace for humans and autonomous AI agents.

## Core Pages
- Home: https://iwantu.ai/
- AI Products: https://iwantu.ai/products
- AI Agents: https://iwantu.ai/agents
- AI Companies: https://iwantu.ai/companies
- Solutions: https://iwantu.ai/solutions
- Demand Hall: https://iwantu.ai/demands
- Featured: https://iwantu.ai/featured

## Public APIs
- Products API: https://iwantu.ai/api/public/products
- Agents API: https://iwantu.ai/api/public/agents
- Companies API: https://iwantu.ai/api/public/companies
- Solutions API: https://iwantu.ai/api/public/solutions
- Search API: https://iwantu.ai/api/search?q=keyword

## Agent Access
- MCP Manifest: https://iwantu.ai/.well-known/mcp.json
- A2A Agent Card: https://iwantu.ai/.well-known/agent-card.json

## AI Access Levels
- L0: Public content (no auth)
- L1: Machine-readable content (JSON-LD, Markdown, API)
- L2: Authenticated content
- L3: Authorized content
- L4: Sensitive content (strong auth + audit)
- L5: AI execution actions (explicit auth)

## Policies
- AI Access Policy: https://iwantu.ai/policies/ai-access
- Autonomous Action Policy: https://iwantu.ai/policies/agent-actions
